parameters-en.Trim: Sets the Nexus input level and is used to compensate for overly soft or loud signals.
parameters-en.Gate: Turns the Input block's built-in noise gate on and off.
parameters-en.Threshold: Sets the noise gate's Threshold. The gate "opens" when the signal's level exceeds the Threshold, to let audio pass through. The gate "closes" when the signal's level drops below the Threshold. Adjust Threshold so only softer, unwanted signals are gated.
parameters-en.Decay: Controls the length of time it takes for the open noise gate to close once the signal drops below the Threshold. Increase Decay if you want the gate to gradually lower the signal instead of chopping it off abruptly.
